--- title: per unit analysis of pmsm machines keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar nb_path: "01_electricmachinepu.ipynb" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %}

This script analyzes the performance of pmsm in per unit scale. The following equations are used for this analysis

{% raw %} 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
{% endraw %}

PMSM model

$V = \sqrt{ (\lambda_m - L_d I \sin(\gamma))^2 + (L_q I \cos(\gamma))^2 }$
$T = \lambda_m I \cos(\gamma)$
